title: Claims Truth Bank
description: Private-aware store of approved, evidence-backed accomplishment claims and an explicit never-claim list. The real working copy (profile/claims/claims-bank.json) is gitignored; only the sanitized example is tracked. Resume/cover-letter tailoring may only draw on claims with review_status=approved, and only for the lanes named in allowed_lanes. Nothing here may be fabricated.

claim_text.description: The claim exactly as it may appear in materials. Must be literally true.

evidence.description: Where this is documented/verifiable (repo, PR, metric source, employer). Not a public URL with PII.

impact.description: Measurable outcome, or null if no defensible metric exists (do NOT invent one).

allowed_lanes.description: Resume variant ids (from config/resume-variants.json) this claim may appear in.

review_status.description: Only 'approved' claims may be used in generated materials. 'needs_user_review' = sourced from raw material but a metric/attribution needs the user's confirmation before use.

fabrication_risk.description: Notes on exaggeration/over-claim risk and how the wording stays honest.
